title: Map Features - Color customization
excerpt: We love the map/location feature and it has become an integral part of our business workflow. If the ability to customize colors for the map pins was available (main items and sub-items), it would help make the map more …

posts.author: LandUser123 (Jason S.)
posts.cookedHtml: We love the map/location feature and it has become an integral part of our business workflow. If the ability to customize colors for the map pins was available (main items and sub-items), it would help make the map more readable in certain circumstances.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jason,

Unfortunately at this moment the Map Widget provided by monday.com does not allow you to customize much. This is why we’ve created a Marketplace app for this: Map View Pro.

Give it a go with the 14 day free trial by installing it from the marketplace. Any feedback (or questions) are more than welcome!

Best,

Maarten
